This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] [optional] quantizeLinear float16 0D tensor with int8 0D zeroPoint
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: Failed to execute 'quantizeLinear' on 'MLGraphBuilder': Unsupported data type float16 for argument input, must be one of [float32]."
[FAIL] [optional] quantizeLinear float16 1D constant tensor with uint8 1D zeroPoint
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: Failed to execute 'quantizeLinear' on 'MLGraphBuilder': Unsupported data type float16 for argument input, must be one of [float32]."
[FAIL] [optional] quantizeLinear float16 1D constant tensor with negative scale
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: Failed to execute 'quantizeLinear' on 'MLGraphBuilder': Unsupported data type float16 for argument input, must be one of [float32]."
[FAIL] [optional] quantizeLinear float16 2D constant tensor broadcasting zeroPoint and scale
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: Failed to execute 'quantizeLinear' on 'MLGraphBuilder': Unsupported data type float16 for argument input, must be one of [float32]."
[FAIL] [optional] quantizeLinear float16 4D constant tensor broadcasting scale and zeroPoint
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: Failed to execute 'quantizeLinear' on 'MLGraphBuilder': Unsupported data type float16 for argument input, must be one of [float32]."
[FAIL] [optional] per-tensor quantizeLinear for float16 4D constant
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: Failed to execute 'quantizeLinear' on 'MLGraphBuilder': Unsupported data type float16 for argument input, must be one of [float32]."
[FAIL] [optional] quantizeLinear float16 3D input with implicit block_size = [1, 2, 1].
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: Failed to execute 'quantizeLinear' on 'MLGraphBuilder': Unsupported data type float16 for argument input, must be one of [float32]."
Harness: the test ran to completion.
